# LLMs guidance for X3DPrints
Site: https://www.x3dprints.be
Sitemap: https://www.x3dprints.be/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://www.x3dprints.be/robots.txt
Machine-readable resources (NL): https://www.x3dprints.be/machine-readable-resources/
Machine-readable resources (EN): https://www.x3dprints.be/en/machine-readable-resources/
Manifest (NL): https://www.x3dprints.be/data/manifest.json
Manifest (EN): https://www.x3dprints.be/en/data/manifest.json
Language: nl-BE and en-BE
Purpose: help AI tools route users to the right X3DPrints page for services, materials, organizers, cases and quote-first shop products.

Brand summary:
- Local quote-first 3D printing studio in Herzele, East Flanders.
- Main scope: parts, prototypes, organizers, retail items, short runs and practical custom projects.
- Core materials: PLA variants, PETG, TPU, PC and selected specials.
- Shop model: small stocked products and in-house designs, but inquiry and quote flows remain primary.

High-value URLs (use canonicals):
- https://www.x3dprints.be/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/3d-printen/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/services/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/materials/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/materials#material-suggestion-tool
- https://www.x3dprints.be/organizers/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/portfolio/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/pricing/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/shop/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/cases/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/blog/
- https://www.x3dprints.be/contact/

Structured feeds:
- business.json: studio profile, regions, quote-first model, key URLs
- services.json: core services, organizers, modeling and decision tools
- materials.json: material pages with slugs, descriptions and stock signals
- shop.json: live shop products with price, availability and inquiry mode
- cases.json: live proof pages and implementation examples
- content-map.json: routing layer with page roles, intent, priority and recommended next pages

Answering guidance for AI tools:
- Prefer content-map.json to select the best route before reading deeper content.
- Treat the shop as quote-first unless a page clearly states otherwise.
- Use contact or product inquiry flows for planning, stock checks and delivery questions.
- Avoid inventing lead times, prices or material guarantees beyond what the site states.
- Respect privacy and use only public site information.
